questionHtml:
Which overlap of atomic orbitals leads to the formation of only a sigma (σ) bond?

       I.     s − p

       II.     p − p

       III.     s − s

A.     I and II only

B.     I and III only

C.     II and III only

D.     I, II and III

meta.title: Which overlap of atomic orbitals leads to the formation of only a sigma (σ) bond? I. s − p II. p − p III. s − s A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and I
breadcrumbLabels: 14.1 Covalent bonding and electron domain and molecular geometries
